title: helia acutangula
intro: Helia acutangula, also known as Chinese thorowax tree or thorowax, is a plant species native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a compound called thorowax, a type of resin that is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Helia acutangula include its ability to treat coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat fever, sore throats, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the seeds are typically dried and used as a powder, and they can also be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
